name: Jascha Heifetz
abstract: Jascha Heifetz (; February 2 [O.S. January 20] 1901 – December 10, 1987) was a Russian-American violinist, widely regarded as one of the greatest violinists of all time.

about_quotes.speaker: Spiegle Willcox and Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: I think you know the story. Many years ago, Jascha Heifetz went to hear Joe Venuti play.
about_quotes.doc_title: Spiegle Willcox and Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Norwich, New York, November 14, 1995
